About

I'm Isha Sahu, a UX/UI designer focused on creating simple, usable products with a strong understanding of real user behavior.

My approach is grounded in:

  • understanding how people behave
  • simplifying complex flows
  • designing interfaces that feel natural & easy to use

I also enjoy exploring ideas at the intersection of design, technology, and AI, especially how emerging tools can shape more intuitive and human-centered experiences.

Outside of work, I spend time on photography, learning guitar, and experimenting with small creatives.

I'm always open to conversations, collaborations, and meaningful projects :)

Get in touch
